overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game (Red Dead Redemption 2) depicting a snowy winter journey through a mountainous forest. The clip begins near a wooden wagon with a character in period clothing, then follows a snow-covered trail through rocky passages and dense pine forests with distant mountain vistas.

events.description: character in dark coat and hat walks past camera and exits frame right
camera begins moving forward along the snowy trail away from the wagon

agents.ego_description: starting near a wooden wagon and beginning to walk down the snowy forest trail

notable_agents.action: character in dark coat and cowboy hat walking from right to left past the camera

entered.detail: old-fashioned wooden supply wagon with canvas cover and wooden wheels
steep rock face dusted with snow forming the left boundary of the clearing
tall evergreen pine trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a snowy wooded clearing where a wooden wagon stands on the right. A character in period clothing walks past the camera and exits the frame. The camera then begins moving forward along a snow-covered trail, leaving the wagon behind as it enters a narrow passage between rocky cliffs and dense forest.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding trail between a rocky cliff face on the left and dense snow-covered bushes on the right

entered.detail: dense shrubs and undergrowth lining the right side of the trail covered in fresh snow
large boulders and rock formations visible through the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a narrow, enclosed forest passage with a steep rocky cliff on the left and dense snow-covered vegetation on the right. The trail is muddy with patches of snow. The wooden wagon from the starting area disappears behind as the path winds deeper into the forest between the rock walls and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail with mountain backdrop

events.description: forest opens up revealing distant snow-capped mountains through the haze

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the terrain opens up to reveal expansive mountain views ahead

entered.detail: snow-covered mountain peaks visible through the atmospheric haze in the background
prominent boulder outcropping among the trees on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail emerges from the narrow rocky passage into a more open forest area with wider spacing between trees. Distant snow-capped mountains become visible through the hazy atmosphere ahead. The rocky cliff recedes into the distance on the left while the path continues forward through the snow-dusted evergreens toward the mountain vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet wooded clearing into a narrow rocky gorge that eventually opens onto a vast mountain vista. It begins beside a wooden wagon as a character in period clothing walks past, before the camera moves forward along a snow-covered trail and leaves the clearing behind. As the path winds deeper into the forest, the environment tightens into a narrow passage enclosed by a steep rocky cliff on the left and dense, snow-covered vegetation on the right. The scene then expands as the trail emerges from the rocky corridor into a more open forest with wider spacing between the evergreens. Finally, the rocky walls recede into the distance while the camera pushes forward through the hazy atmosphere toward a horizon of distant snow-capped mountains.
